title: What would have happened if Shinji had piloted Eva 02
display_title: What would have happened if Shinji had piloted Eva 02
wikitext:
[]: What would have happened if Shinji had piloted Eva-02?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Sun Oct 04, 2009 2:20 pm In the fight with Gaghiel, Shinji broke his own sync record with Eva-01. What would have happened if they sortied him in Eva-02 in a fight?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Oct 04, 2009 2:37 pm Nothing. The only reason he could synch with Eva-02 is because Asuka was there. It's noted in 14 that Eva-02 isn't compatible with switching the pilots the same way Eva-00 or Eva-01 is.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sun Oct 04, 2009 3:22 pm why?

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Oct 04, 2009 3:27 pm Souls. Kyoko only synched with Shinji because Asuka was there. Yui synchs because Shinji is there, and Rei is basically Yui so there's a connection when Yui is willing to play nice. Why Shinji can attempt to synch with Eva-00 we don't know. It might be that the part of Rei's soul in charge of self-preservation is in there, and that since Rei is EVERYONE'S mom, it works.

[]:             Quote Post by Rock-Slash » Sun Oct 04, 2009 3:39 pm Then why Toji couldn't synch with Unit01 when he and Kensuke entered the entry plug in ep4?

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Sun Oct 04, 2009 3:41 pm I dont think they did. or maybe they did but it wasnt mentioned.

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Sun Oct 04, 2009 4:06 pm Option 1: They did but it wasn't mentioned. Option 2: Yui-sama didn't let them, whereas Kyoko-sama was willing to let Shinji join in. Option 3: They weren't trying.

[]:             Quote Post by Dranzer » Sun Oct 04, 2009 4:17 pm They did try to sync with the eva...I mean,when they entered,Ritsuko mentoined that the syncro graph is dropped...because of them.So they did try,but Yui didn't let them. But in 1.0,Ritsuko said nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Oct 04, 2009 6:57 pm Of course, the syncro graph probably dropped not because of their presence but because Shinji WAS ABOUT TO WIG THE FUCK OUT as he's prone to do. He typically does this bell curve "Go low, speed up like you're on meth" syncing shit.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Sun Oct 04, 2009 7:25 pm Dranzer wrote: They did try to sync with the eva...I mean,when they entered,Ritsuko mentoined that the syncro graph is dropped...because of them.So they did try,but Yui didn't let them. But in 1.0,Ritsuko said nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by Dranzer » Sun Oct 04, 2009 11:17 pm Yeah,that's right.They weren't trying to sync,just mental noises...now I remember But still,its interesting.
